REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT LINDA HOLMES MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART. MOTION IS GRANTED AS TO ISSUE 1 ON THE SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION. MOVING PARTY SHIFTED ITS BURDEN AND THE PLAINTIFF FAILED TO CREATE A TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT. MOTION IS DENIED AS TO ISSUE 2 REGARDING THE PURPORTED CLAIM FOR TREBLE DAMAGES IN THE THIRD CAUSE OF ACTION. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS FRAMED BY THE PLEADINGS. MOVING PARTY FAILS TO POINT TO ANY PART OF THE THIRD CAUSE OF ACTION CLAIMING TREBLE DAMAGES BY PARAGRAPH OR PAGE/LINE NUMBER. THE COURT TOOK JUDICIAL NOTICE OF THE COMPLAINT AND COULD NOT LOCATE ANY REQUEST FOR TREBLE DAMAGES WITHIN THE THIRD CAUSE OF ACTION, PAGES 12:15-13:1. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY; CLERK: VANESSA WU; NOT REPORTED. (D501)

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT LINDA HOLMES NOTICE OF MOTION FOR AWARD OF ATTORNEYS FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO SFAC 37.9(F) IS DENIED. MOVING PARTY FAILED TO CITE ANY AUTHORITY FOR THE PROPOSITION THAT IT IS THE "PREVAILING PARTY" ENTITLED TO RECOVERY OF ATTORNEY'S FEES IN THIS ACTION THAT HAS NOT YET BEEN REDUCED TO A JUDGMENT OR BEEN DISMISSED. DEFENDANT MAY FILE ITS MOTION FOR ATTORNEY'S FEES IF NECESSARY AND PROPER UPON ENTRY OF JUDGMENT OR DISMISSAL. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE: CHARLES F. (***DISMISSED***) REMOVED FROM MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR SEP-08-2025 - NO APPEARANCE FOR SELF-REPRESENTED PLAINTIFF, DANIEL FELDMAN, PH.D. APPEARANCE BY MS. JO ANNE FELDMAN, MOTHER OF THE PLAINTIFF, VIA ZOOM FOR SCHEDULING PURPOSES. APPEARANCE BY ATTY. ADRIANNE C. DUNCAN AND ATTY. JUDITH S. MCAULAY FOR DEFENDANT. COURT REPORTER VANESSA CLAYTON, CSR #13112, APPEARED VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL MADE AN ORAL MOTION TO DISMISS THIS CASE PURSUANT TO CCP 581(B)(5). DEFENDANT ALSO REQUESTED TO DECLARE PLAINTIFF, DANIEL FELDMAN, PH.D, A VEXATIOUS LITIGANT AND REQUESTED PLAINTIFF TO POST A BOND OF $10,000.00 PURSUANT TO CCP 391. MS. JOANNE FELDMAN OPPOSED DEFENDANT'S ORAL MOTION AND REQUESTED A CONTINUANCE OF THE TRIAL DATE FOR 120 DAYS. THE COURT DENIED MS. FELDMAN'S REQUEST FOR A CONTINUANCE OF THE TRIAL DATE. THE COURT GRANTED DEFENDANT'S ORAL MOTION TO DISMISS WITHOUT PREJUDICE THE COMPLAINT PURSUANT TO CCP 581. REASONS FOR THE GRANTING OF THE MOTION IS AS STATED ON THE RECORD. THE COURT DENIED DEFENDANT'S ORAL MOTION TO DECLARE PLAINTIFF A VEXATIOUS LITIGANT. (SEE MINI-MINUTES.) JUDGE: ROCHELLE EAST; CLERK: D. LOK; COURT REPORTER: VANESSA CLAYTON, CSR #13112, VANESSA.CLAYTONCSR@HOTMAIL.COM. (206)

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-08-2025 Dismissal - No Appearance
MINI MINUTES: MASTER COURT TRIAL SET ON SEP-08-2025

No appearance for self-represented Plaintiff, Daniel Feldman, Ph.D. Appearance by Ms. Jo Anne Feldman, mother of the Plaintiff, via Zoom for scheduling purposes.

Appearance by Atty. Adrianne C. Duncan and Atty. Judith S. McAulay for Defendant.

Court Reporter Vanessa Clayton, CSR #13112, appeared via Zoom

Defendant's counsel made an oral motion to dismiss this case pursuant to CCP 581(b)(5). Defendant also requested to declare Plaintiff, Daniel Feldman, Ph.D, a vexatious litigant and requested Plaintiff to post a bond of $10,000.00 pursuant to CCP 391. Evidence of a pattern of non-appearances at trial call and filing of cases in other states, District Courts, and Supreme Court was presented on the record.

Ms. JoAnne Feldman opposed Defendant's oral motion and requested a continuance of the trial date for 120 days.

After the matter was submitted, the Court denied Ms. Feldman's request for a continuance of the trial date. The Court granted Defendant's oral motion to dismiss without prejudice the complaint pursuant to CCP 581. Reasons for the granting of the motion is as stated on the record. The Court denied Defendant's oral motion to declare Plaintiff a vexatious litigant.

Judge: Rochelle East; Clerk: D. Lok; Court Reporter: Vanessa Clayton, CSR #13112, vanessa.claytoncsr@hotmail.com. (206)

Notice Of Motion For Award Of Attorneys Fees And Costs Pursuant To Sfac 37.9(F)
Off Calendar May-24-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

DEFENDANT LINDA HOLMES NOTICE OF MOTION FOR AWARD OF ATTORNEYS FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO SFAC 37.9(F) is DENIED. Moving party failed to cite any authority for the proposition that it is the "prevailing party" entitled to recovery of attorney's fees in this action that has not yet been reduced to a judgment or been dismissed. Defendant may file its motion for attorney's fees if necessary and proper upon entry of judgment or dismissal.

Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Vanessa Wu; Not Reported. (D501)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-05-2024 Continued To Sep-16-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION
Off Calendar Feb-01-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:

Daniel Feldman, PH.D, Plaintiff in Pro Per, via zoom
Jody Struck Esq., HAAPALA, ALTURA, THOMPSON & ABERN, LLP, 510-763-2324, via zoom for defendant

Mr. Feldman contests the tentative. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT LINDA HOLMES MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION is GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Motion is granted as to issue 1 on the second cause of action. Moving party shifted its burden and the plaintiff failed to create a triable issue of material fact. Motion is denied as to issue 2 regarding the purported claim for treble damages in the third cause of action. Motion for Summary Adjudication is framed by the pleadings. Moving party fails to point to any part of the third cause of action claiming treble damages by paragraph or page/line number. The Court took judicial notice of the Complaint and could not locate any request for treble damages within the third cause of action, pages 12:15-13:1.

Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: Vanessa Wu; Not Reported. (D501)
